flashcards.definition: Forces along members are found by resolving force triangles using Laws of Sines/Cosines.
A closed loop of measured angles and distances; areas computed by breaking into triangles.
Rise over run; the angle is found using tan⁻¹(rise/run).
Breaking a force into components along and perpendicular to a direction.
Divide into triangles, compute each area (½ab sin C), and sum.
